TOOLBOX WEB APP

Toolbox Platform

Same visual language as SAP Playbook, now at app level. Launch tools, save workflows, and install it to your desktop like a standalone app.

Knowledge Base

SAP Playbook

Capture and search SAP fixes with screenshots and local-first storage.

Projects

Project Manager

Plan workstreams and track milestones in one shared workspace.

Import

Repo Import Wizard

Paste a GitHub URL and import the project into Toolbox as a local page.

Open feature

Built with Next.js, React, TypeScript and local-first architecture.
